body: This bead is too large to execute as a single bounded pass and cannot be decomposed further because the execution tree is already at the split-depth cap. The contract spans multiple unrelated subsystems: work pre-close coordination, reviewer transport/retry plumbing, review classification taxonomy, repair-cycle scheduling, and a large new test matrix across cli/internal/agent/*. The requested ACs also exceed the one-bead scope by requiring both implementation and a full suite of new/updated tests. A follow-up should split this into smaller beads before implementation.

no_changes
rationale: status: needs_investigation

This bead requests a new adversarial pre-close review coordinator, new reviewer correlation fields, repair-cycle behavior, terminal operator-blocking classifications, and eight dedicated tests spanning work and reviewer code. The worktree note says this execution bead is already at decomposition depth 2, so I cannot split it further here. The contract is too large for a safe single-pass implementation in this attempt, and I am not going to half-implement the review gate.
